Would You Rather

Eat soylent for every meal for the rest of your life or eat anything you want but it must be served at your max tolerance for spiciness?

Spice tolerance is personal and adjusts as you become more and more adapted to spice or eat whatever you want for the rest of your life but everything is spicy at your max tolerance. Spice is added via drops of condensed oil to mask other flavours. Soylent is a calorie dense shake that provides all the essential vitamins and nutrients to live a healthy life

Soylent50%
Anything but max spice50%
